reviews.name: 박****
reviews.content:
완전 최애 장난감됐어요ㅠㅠㅠㅠ 
공에 환장하는 강아지인데 이번 장난감은 성공한 것 같아요.
삑삑 거리는 소리도 좋아하고 바나나 껍질을 들고 마구 흔들어 재낍니다. 아주 사랑스럽다❤️
reviews.content_en: It's become my pup's absolute favorite toy 😭😭😭 My dog is obsessed with balls, and this toy seems like a total win. He loves the squeaky sound and shakes the banana peel around like crazy. It's so adorable ❤️

reviews.name: 박****
reviews.content: 잘가지고 놀아요 ! ㅎㅎ 안에 간식넣고 노즈워크하기도 괜찮아요
reviews.content_en: He plays with it so well! 😄 It's also great for nose work games when you put treats inside.

reviews.name: 김****
reviews.content: 아이가 좋아하는건 물론이거니와 인형이 너무 귀여워요
reviews.content_en: My dog loves it, of course, and the plush is just too cute!

reviews.name: 이****
reviews.content: 도대체 몇개를 샀는지도 모를만큼 많이 구입했어요 너무 좋아하는데 망가뜨리는건 3분이면 끝나요
reviews.content_en: I've bought so many I've lost count! He loves it so much, but destroys it in just 3 minutes 😅

reviews.name: 박****
reviews.content:
울집 콩이 애정템 바나나 장난감!!!
5~6개월전에 이 바나나 장난감을 사줬는데 아무리 세탁해도 꼬질꼬질해졌길래 그 친구는 놓아주고 다시 새걸로 장만했어요!! 진짜 이 바나나가 입에 물고 다니기 좋은지 어딜가나 바나나를 입에 물고 다녀요!!
봉제도 튼튼하니 빵꾸도 잘 안나고 삑삑이도 튼튼해서 잘 고장이 안나고 좋아요! 디자인도 너무 귀엽구요!! 바나나껍질 안에 사료넣고 바나나 넣어서 주면 쏙쏙 잘빼먹는게 너무 귀여워용ㅎㅎㅎ 요런 귀여운 디자인 많이 내주셔서 감사합니다! 강아지 장난감은 무조건 바잇미가 짱입니다잉!
reviews.content_en: This banana toy is my Kong's absolute favorite! 💕 I got him this banana toy about 5-6 months ago, and even after washing it so many times, it got all grimy, so I retired that one and got him a new one! He seriously loves carrying this banana around in his mouth everywhere he goes! The stitching is really durable so it doesn't tear easily, and the squeaker is sturdy and doesn't break easily - I love it! The design is also super cute!! When I put kibble inside the banana peel and give it to him, it's so adorable watching him carefully pick out the treats 😂 Thank you for making such cute designs! BITE ME toys are definitely the best for dog toys!!

reviews.name: 임****
reviews.content: 바나나껍질은 바스락 거리고 바나나속은 삑삑이가 들어있어서 저희집 강아지가 좋아하구요~ 노즈워크도 성공적이예요!!
reviews.content_en: The banana peel crinkles and the banana has a squeaker inside, so my pup loves it~ And nose work training with it has been a success!!

reviews.name: 정****
reviews.content:
저희 집에 바나나 살인마가 있어욤 
하루도 안빠지고 가지고 놀아서 바나나가 까매져서 또 구매했습니다 
여태 구매한 바나나 합치면 한송이는 충분히 만들어질거같아요 ㅎㅎ
엄마멍이의 애착인형인데 아가멍이도 엄청 좋아해요 
장난감 취향 비스무링 ㅎㅎㅎ 여튼 평생 팔아주세요 🫶🏻
reviews.content_en: We have a banana assassin in our house 🍌 He plays with it every single day without fail, and the banana's gotten so dark we had to buy another one. If we added up all the bananas we've bought, we could probably make a whole bunch 😂 It's the mama dog's comfort toy, but the puppy loves it so much too! Looks like they have the same toy taste 😄 Anyway, please keep selling these forever 🫶🏻

reviews.name: 김****
reviews.content:
바나나가 분리도 된다니 바스락 소리까지 !
노즈워크 첫 도전 해보겠습니다 ㅎㄹ
reviews.content_en: The banana comes apart AND it crinkles! 🍌 We're going to try nose work for the first time!

reviews.name: 김****
reviews.content: 강아지가 인형이 있어야만 밥을 먹어서 열 개째 구매중이에요 ㅎ
reviews.content_en: My dog won't eat unless he has a toy with him, so this is my 10th purchase already 😄

reviews.name: 박****
reviews.content:
새로운 노즈워크가 필요했음 !
지극히 내 스타일로 고른 아이들
너무너무 귀여웡 ㅜㅜ 
새끼손톱만한 노즈워크 간식을
그마저도 반을 잘라 넣어줍니다
너무 잘빼먹어서ㅡㅡ ㅋ ㅋ 
잘라 넣어주니 성질나서 씩씩거리는데
그것도 귀여워 .. ㅋ ㅋ ㅋㅋ
reviews.content_en: Needed a new nose work toy! 🧩 I picked these out based purely on my taste - they're way too cute 🥺 I put treats that are tiny (like my pinky nail) inside, and I even cut those in half because he's too good at finding them 😅 When I cut them up, he gets frustrated and huffs and puffs, and that's cute too 😂

reviews.name: 유****
reviews.content: 인스타에서 메리가 바나나 인형만 갖고 놀길래 어디서 구해야하나 했는데ㅋㅋㅋ 마침 바잇미에서 메리's 바나나로 출시되어서 넘 좋아요!! 바나나 속이랑 껍질 분리도 되고 진짜 귀여워요ㅋㅋ
reviews.content_en: I saw Merry playing with just banana plushies on Instagram and wondered where to get one lol 😂 Then BITE ME released Merry's Banana and I'm so happy!! The banana comes apart so you can separate the inside and peel, and it's seriously adorable lol

reviews.name: 김****
reviews.content: 아기강아지한테 무조건 추천해요!! 바스락소리에 무게도 가볍고 물수 있는 곳이 많아서 정말 좋아해요! 최애장난감이 되었어요^^
reviews.content_en: I definitely recommend this for puppies!! The crinkly sound is great, it's lightweight, and there are so many spots to bite on - my pup loves it! It became her favorite toy^^

reviews.name: 이****
reviews.content: 가격만 조금 내렸으면 좋겠어요ㅜㅜ 이 장난감만 너무 좋아해요
reviews.content_en: I wish the price was a bit lower ㅜㅜ My dog loves this toy so much

reviews.name: 김****
reviews.content: 귀여운 바나나 친구ㅜ너무 귀엽고 제 욕심으로 샀지만 저희집 강아지가 놀기 딱 좋은 크기라 좋습니다! 다만 바나나 인형이 조금 뚱뚱해서 아쉬워용...색감도 이쁘고 크기도 적당합니다
reviews.content_en: Such a cute banana buddy ㅜ It's super cute and I bought it for myself really, but it's the perfect size for my dog to play with! The only thing is the banana plushie is a bit chubby which is a shame... The color looks nice and the size is just right

reviews.name: 임****
reviews.content:
솔직히 제가 갖구 싶구 키링하고 싶지만 뚜비에게 양보했어요(?)
바나나 껍질 벗기면 알맹이 너무 웃기구 귀여워요ㅜㅜ🍌💛
reviews.content_en: Honestly I wanted to keep it and turn it into a keychain, but I gave it to Toby (?) 😂 When you peel off the banana skin, the inside is so funny and cute ㅜㅜ🍌💛

reviews.name: 반****
reviews.content: 너무 힘들어여... 자꾸 가져오는데... 바나나가 짧아서 잡을 곳이 없어요 ㅋㅋㅋㅋㅋㅋㅋㅋㅋㅋ 그래도 좋아해서 다행인거같아요 ㅎㅎㅎㅎ (원래 살생각이 없었는데... 리뷰가 너무 좋길래 구매해봤습니다!!!)
reviews.content_en: This is exhausting... he keeps bringing it to me... The banana is so short there's nowhere to grip it lol 😂😂😂😂😂 But at least he loves it so that's good lol (I wasn't planning to buy it originally, but the reviews were so good I decided to try it!!!)

reviews.name: 진****
reviews.content:
애기들이 물고 가지고노는 장난감인데 마감처리 엉망이라
튿어져서 튀어나온 비닐 먹고있는거 보고 입 억지로 벌려서 뺐네요..?못봤으면 어쩔뻔...;;
강아지 장난감들 중에서 유일하게 터진 인형입니다.
목구멍 넘어가기 직전이었어요 터진거보고 화가나서
왠만하면 리뷰 5점으로 다 쓰는데 1점드립니다.
진짜 이건아닌듯싶네요.
주변에 이 장난감 있는집들 다 그랬다는데 개선필요한듯요ㅡㅡ
reviews.content_en: My pups bite and play with this toy, but the finishing is terrible - it ripped and vinyl started coming out, so I had to force his mouth open to pull it out..? If I hadn't noticed... 😨 Out of all my dog's toys, this is the only one that broke. It was almost down his throat when I noticed the tear and got really upset. Usually I give 5 stars for everything, but this gets 1 star. This really doesn't seem right. I heard from other families with this toy that theirs did the same thing too - this definitely needs improvement ㅡㅡ

reviews.name: 채****
reviews.content:
너무 귀여워요!! 껍질이랑 속살이랑 분리되서
두가지로 가지고 놀수 있어요!
크기는 미니 바나나 정도 크기예요
reviews.content_en: It's so cute!! The peel and the inside are separate so my dog can play with two different parts! The size is like a mini banana

reviews.name: 김****
reviews.content:
집에 베스트** 바스락 삑삑 장난감들이 많은데 너무 귀여워서 구매했어요. 껍데기는 바스락거리고, 바나나 알맹이는 삑삑 소리가 나요. 
2.3키로 강아지가 갖고 놀기에 매우 적당한 크기이고 잘 갖고 놀아요.
사진찍으려고 할때부터 자기 것인줄 알아차리고 옆에서 계속 달라고 낑낑거렸어요. 
너무 귀여워서 또 구매하고 싶어요. 
포장 디테일도 최고예요.
reviews.content_en: I have lots of crinkly squeaky toys at home but this was so adorable I had to buy it. The peel makes a crinkly sound and the banana inside squeaks. It's the perfect size for my 2-3kg dog to play with and she loves it. She recognized it was hers the moment I tried to take a photo and kept whining and asking for it from beside me. I'm so tempted to buy another one because it's just too cute. The packaging details are amazing too!

reviews.name: 박****
reviews.content:
너무 귀여워요.
바스락 바스락 소리에 아이가 열심히 깨물깨물 하네요.
껍질이 벗겨져서 알맹이도 껍질도 가지고 놀아요. ㅎㅎ
reviews.content_en: It's so cute. My pup is enthusiastically chewing away with the crinkly crinkly sounds. The peel comes off so she plays with both the inside and the peel ㅎㅎ

reviews.name: 다****
reviews.content: 배송 빠르고 강아지가 너무 잘 가지고 놀아요~ 바잇미 장난감 좋아해서 삑삑이 소리나는 장난감 많이 나왔으면 하네요
reviews.content_en: Shipping was fast and my pup loves playing with it so much~ My dog really likes BITE ME toys, so I wish they made more toys with squeaky sounds!

reviews.name: 경****
reviews.content:
아주 정신을 못 차리네요 귀여워 ㅜㅜ
최애인 바스락이랑 뽁뽁이 거기다 노즈워크까지 울 사랑이 행보캐~~~
reviews.content_en: I can't even handle how cute this is ㅜㅜ My love is having the time of their life with their favorite crinkly toy, the bubble wrap texture, AND the nose work game~~~

reviews.name: 강****
reviews.content: 짱귀여워요 ㅎㅎ 삑삑이도 있고 바스락도 있어서 좋아요 ㅎㅎ
reviews.content_en: It's so adorable ㅎㅎ I like that it has both a squeaky sound and crinkly material ㅎㅎ

reviews.name: L****
reviews.content: 예전부터 바나나인형 사주고싶었는데 마땅한걸 못찾다가 이번에 사줬는데 너무 잘 갖고놀고 귀여워서 재가 더 기분이 좋아요! 바나나 속살(?) 과 껍질이 분리되서 안에 간식 숨겨두고 찾는 놀이 노즈워크도 가능하고 바스락 소리가 나니까 애기가 좋아하더라구요 ㅎㅎ 바잇미 장난감 추천합니다!!
reviews.content_en: I've wanted to get a banana toy for a while but couldn't find a good one, so I finally got this one and my pup loves it so much—I'm even happier than she is! The banana has a separated flesh and peel so you can hide treats inside for nose work games, plus the crinkly sound is amazing. My baby absolutely loves it ㅎㅎ I highly recommend BITE ME toys!!

reviews.name: 이****
reviews.content:
너무 잘 갖고놀아용~~
삑삑이 여분이 있어서 좋네요 :)
reviews.content_en:
My pup plays with it all the time~~
It's great that there are extra squeakers included :)

reviews.name: 이****
reviews.content: 진짜 엄~~~~~청 좋아해요ㅋㅋㅋㅋㅋㅋㅋ 저희 집 멍멍이가 과일을 몇개 몰라서 바나나 딸기 체리 이렇게 좋아하는데 진짜 바나나 모양이랑 비슷해서 너무너무너무너무 좋아해요ㅋㅋㅋㅋㅋㅋ 특이하게 과육보다 바스락 거리는 껍질에 미쳐요 혼자 던지고 흔들고 난리가 났어요 뺏지도 못하게 막 도망가고ㅋㅋㅋㅋㅋ 너무 물고 가지고 놀아서 곧 찢어질거 같아서 하나 더 구매해야할듯 해요ㅠㅠ 다른 과일도 만들어주세요!!
reviews.content_en: My dog absolutely LOVES it lol She likes a few fruits but banana, strawberry, cherry—but this banana toy looks so similar that she's obsessed with it ㅋㅋㅋㅋㅋ Interestingly, she's crazy about the crinkly peel rather than the flesh part. She's throwing it around, shaking it, just going wild lol She won't even let me take it away, just runs off with it ㅋㅋㅋㅋㅋ She plays with it so much I think it's going to tear soon, so I'll probably need to buy another one ㅠㅠ Please make other fruit designs too!!

reviews.name: 임****
reviews.content: 귀여운 강아지 친구 선물로 구매햤어요!!
reviews.content_en: I bought it as a gift for my cute pup friend!!

reviews.name: e****
reviews.content:
화면에선 커보였는데 받아보니 작아요. 귀엽^^
자기껀 줄 아는지 뜯자마자 물고 도망감ㅎㅎ
알갱이보다 바나나껍질을 잘 가지고 노네요. 짱 좋아함♡
reviews.content_en: It looked bigger on the screen, but it's smaller in person. Still cute though^^ As soon as I gave it to her, she grabbed it and ran away ㅎㅎ She plays with the banana peel more than the inner part. She absolutely loves it♡

reviews.name: 조****
reviews.content: 찐 바나나는 자기 취향 아니라고 안먹는 몽총이인데 바나나 삑삑이는 좋아죽겠대요 🍌바잇미 장난감은 넘 귀요오💛
reviews.content_en: My Mongchongi doesn't like real bananas and won't eat them, but she's obsessed with this banana squeaky toy 🍌 BITE ME toys are so cute💛

reviews.name: 정****
reviews.content: 너무 귀여워요 금방 헤져서 아쉬워요
reviews.content_en: It's so adorable but unfortunately it wears out pretty quickly 😔

reviews.name: u****
reviews.content: 알맹이는 2갤 애기만하자만ㅋㅋㅋ 그래도 뽑아서 줘보니 잘 가지고 놀아요
reviews.content_en: The toy itself is only about 2 gallons lol but when I give it to him he plays with it really well 😄

reviews.name: 이****
reviews.content: 장난감중 바나나랑 노즈워크 젤 조아해요 ㅎㅎ 바나나는 오자마자 껍질 벗기며 노느라 정신 없습니당
reviews.content_en: Out of all the toys, he loves the banana and nose work toy the most ㅎㅎ He was so excited about the banana that he's been busy peeling off the skin and playing with it

reviews.name: 나****
reviews.content: 저희집아이가 너무 물고 뜯는걸 좋아해서 이미 조금 뜯겼지만ㅋㅋ 진짜 좋아하네요. 알맹이 빼고 간식넣고 다시 알맹이넣어서 주면 한참 잘 가지고 놀아요!
reviews.content_en: My pup loves chewing and biting, so it's already gotten a little torn lol but he seriously loves it! When I take out the toy, put treats inside, and put the toy back together, he plays with it for ages! 😄

reviews.name: 이****
reviews.content: 벌써 4번째 구매입니다!! 바나나 겁데기는 아기가 별로 관심이 없어서 여러개 쌓여있고 알맹이는 입에 쏙 들어오는 사이즈라서 엄청엄청 좋아해요
reviews.content_en: This is already my 4th purchase!! The banana peel doesn't really catch my baby's interest so I have a few sitting around, but the actual banana piece is the perfect size that fits right in his mouth so he absolutely loves it

reviews.name: 김****
reviews.content: 모양도 귀엽고 바나나알맹이가 빠져서 노즈워크도 되고 껍질은 바스락, 바나나알맹이는 삑삑이도 됩니당
reviews.content_en: The design is super cute and since the banana piece comes out it works as a nose work toy too - the peel makes a crinkly sound and the banana piece has a squeaker 😄

reviews.name: 박****
reviews.content: 강아지가 잘 가지고 놀아요!! 노즈워크 용으로도 좋네용. 그런데 삑삑 소리는 잘 안납니다 ㅠㅠ
reviews.content_en: My dog plays with it really well!! It's great for nose work too. But the squeaker sound doesn't work that well ㅠㅠ

reviews.name: 성****
reviews.content: 강쥐보다 제가 귀여워서 구매했어요ㅋㅋ 근데 바나나안쪽에 트릿 숨기기 괜찮네요
reviews.content_en: I actually bought it because I thought it was cuter than my dog lol But hiding treats inside the banana is a nice feature 😄

reviews.name: 다****
reviews.content: 너무 좋아하고 잘 가지고 놀아요
reviews.content_en: He loves it so much and plays with it all the time

reviews.name: 임****
reviews.content: 난이도는 쉽지만, 강아지가 한입에 물고다니기 좋아요
reviews.content_en: The difficulty level is easy, but my dog loves carrying it around in his mouth

reviews.name: 다****
reviews.content: 잘 가지고 놀고 좋아해요^^ 배송 빨라요
reviews.content_en: He plays with it and loves it ^^ Shipping is fast too

reviews.name: 한****
reviews.content:
진짜 너무 귀여워요
아가가 너무 어리고 작아서 알맹이는 아직 못놀고 껍질 물고 다니는데 진짜 귀여워요
reviews.content_en: It's seriously so cute 🥰 My pup is still really young and small, so they can't play with the inside part yet and just carries around the shell, but it's honestly adorable

reviews.name: 이****
reviews.content: 애기강아지라 관심없을줄 알았는데 요 바나나를 젤 좋아하네욯ㅎ 바나나속 빼서 물고다님 심폭행이에요 ㅎㅎ
reviews.content_en: I thought my puppy would ignore it since he's so little, but he absolutely loves this banana! 😄 He's always carrying it around with the banana peel in his mouth—it's hilarious

reviews.name: d****
reviews.content: 이 장난감 우리 멍뮹이 입에 딱맞아서 들고다니면 징짜 귀여오요ㅠㅠ 잘때도 꼭 데리고자요ㅠㅠ
reviews.content_en: This toy fits my pup's mouth perfectly, and when he carries it around it's seriously the cutest thing 🥺🥺 He even sleeps with it 🥺🥺

reviews.name: 김****
reviews.content: 색감이나 디자인 너무 귀엽고 간식 넣어주니 너무 좋아하고 잘 가지고 놀아요~
reviews.content_en: The colors and design are super cute, and once I put treats inside, my dog loves it and plays with it all the time~

reviews.name: n****
reviews.content: 전부터 고민하던 장난감인데 분리도 가능하고 작아서 댕댕이가 너무 좋아하네요~
reviews.content_en: I've been thinking about getting this toy for a while, and since it's detachable and compact, my pup absolutely loves it~

reviews.name: 김****
reviews.content: 노즈워킹도 되고 사이즈도 물고다니기 알맞아서 너무 좋아요 🤍 굿!!!
reviews.content_en: It works great for nose work games, and the size is perfect for carrying around. Love it so much! 🤍 Highly recommend!!!

reviews.name: 박****
reviews.content: 최애 인형을 버리고 뉴바나나를 택하고 열심히 뜯고있어요ㅎㅎㅎㅠㅠㅠ
reviews.content_en: My dog ditched his favorite toy and chose the NEW BANANA instead—he's been tearing it apart happily 😂😭😭

reviews.name: L****
reviews.content: 저번에 한 번 구매해봤는데 너무 잘 갖고 놀아서 새거 사주고 싶어 재구매했어요! 귀엽기도 하고 외출 할 때 바나나 껍질에 간식 넣어놓고 나가면 찾아 먹느라 바빠서 안따라나오더라구요 ㅎ.ㅎ 바스락, 삑삑, 노즈워크까지!! 아주 유용하게 잘 사용하고 있어요~~
reviews.content_en: I bought this once before and my dog loved playing with it so much that I just had to repurchase it! It's adorable, and when I go out, I stuff treats in the banana peel and he's so busy hunting for them that he doesn't follow me out the door 😄 It's got crinkle sounds, squeakers, AND nose work features!! I'm using it all the time~~

reviews.name: c****
reviews.content: 옴청 귀엽네요 강아지보다 주인이 더 맘에들었어요
reviews.content_en: It's seriously so cute 🥰 I like it more than my dog does honestly

reviews.name: c****
reviews.content: 너무 귀엽고 제 스탈잉요 귀염상승
reviews.content_en: So adorable, and honestly it's totally my style—cuteness level: maximum ↑
